summary: Critical swarm health degradation — 78% of agent worktrees stuck since ~01:17 UTC. SQLite bindings failure blocks governance runtime in all scheduler-spawned worktrees. All 6 open PRs have failing CI. No PRs mergeable this cycle.

p0Issues.title: Swarm Health Alert — 78% worktrees stuck
p0Issues.detail: 5/9 agent worktrees stuck since ~01:17 UTC (16+ hours). Agents: kernel-sr (x2), pr-merger-agent (x2), workspace-pr-review-agent. All at commit ae37b15 with no work committed — likely failed at startup. Root cause: SQLite bindings failure (#1118) prevents governance runtime from starting, which is a required prerequisite for scheduled agents.
p0Issues.action: Prune dead worktrees, investigate startup failure, re-queue stalled agents

p0Issues.title: [dogfood] agentguard guard fails with SQLite bindings error in worktrees
p0Issues.detail: better-sqlite3 bindings not compiled for Node v22 ABI v127 in scheduler-spawned worktrees. Every worktree launch fails the governance runtime prerequisite. Three options: (1) rebuild bindings workspace-wide, (2) expose agentguard on PATH, (3) add --no-sqlite flag for fail-open operation.
p0Issues.action: Implement option 3 (--no-sqlite flag) as short-term fix; file task for workspace-level rebuild
p0Issues.recommendation: Highest priority — unblocks all stuck agents

rootCauses.detail: Agents not running pnpm format:fix before committing. Affected files vary per PR. Files format correctly on main — this is per-branch agent behavior.
rootCauses.fix: Add pre-push format:fix step to agent commit workflow, or configure format on CI auto-fix

rootCauses.failingCase: tryGoFastPath > merges rules from multiple policies
rootCauses.detail: Test passes on main (12/12). Each PR that touches policy-related code introduces a regression. PRs need individual investigation.
rootCauses.fix: Each PR author must identify what change breaks the multi-policy merge assertion and fix

bugs.title: SQLite bindings fail in worktrees (Node v22 ABI v127)
bugs.impact: Governance runtime non-functional in all scheduler worktrees

bugs.title: False positive: destructive detection fires on report content
bugs.impact: Agents cannot write analysis reports via shell heredoc
bugs.pattern: 7+ codex-driver agents hitting this — issues #1097-#1107 are likely symptoms

bugs.title: Stop hook fails in sub-repos without node_modules
security_reminder_hook blocks Write on GH Actions workflows

codexDenialPattern.hypothesis: Most likely related to false-positive destructive detection (#1119). Codex agents writing reports or processing text that mentions blocked command patterns are getting denied. Recommend triaging each issue to confirm.
codexDenialPattern.recommendation: Batch-label these as related to #1119 and close as duplicates once root cause confirmed

worktreeCleanup.action: Run git worktree prune for prunable; investigate and re-queue stuck agents after SQLite fix

blockers: SQLite bindings failure blocks governance runtime in all worktrees (#1118) — P0
All 6 open PRs have failing CI — 0 mergeable
Swarm operational capacity at 22% (2/9 active agents)

crossRepoStatus.agentGuard: red — CI failing, governance runtime broken in worktrees
crossRepoStatus.agentguardCloud: yellow — pr-merger-agent found no eligible PRs; some drafts/conflicts
crossRepoStatus.agentguardAnalytics: yellow — analytics agents hitting false-positive governance denials

nextActions.action: Fix SQLite bindings error (#1118) — implement --no-sqlite flag or rebuild bindings workspace-wide
Fix PR #1109 (OpenCode adapter) lint failure — run pnpm format:fix, repush — closest to mergeable
Investigate go-fast-path test regression and provide guidance to PR authors
Prune dead worktrees (2 prunable) and re-queue stalled agents after SQLite fix
Triage codex denial issues #1097-#1107 — batch-link to #1119 false positive
Stale branch cleanup — 149 branches via workspace-backlog-steward
